name: Seaport Event Catering
description: A large-scale, budget-friendly catering company based in Boston's Seaport district. Specializes in high-volume events with efficient service and reliable quality. Great for couples who want solid food and professional service without breaking the bank.

service_area.note: We have the fleet and staff to go anywhere in New England. Flat $300 fee beyond 50 miles. We regularly serve Cape Cod, NH, and RI.

serviceware.eco_note: Eco-friendly serviceware available at $2/head upcharge. Our food truck packages use compostable packaging by default.

bar_service.note: Full bar service available with all packages. Bartenders included for events over 100 guests. Below 100, bartender fee is $250.

sweeteners: Free appetizer course for events over 200 guests
Complimentary coffee and tea service included with all packages
Free setup and breakdown for buffet service
Late-night slider station at no extra cost for 300+ guest events

highlights: food truck was a crowd favorite
ratings.new_vendor_note: Running a 10% off promotion for new wedding clients to build their wedding-specific portfolio

personality: Efficient, reliable, and volume-oriented. Seaport Event Catering runs like a well-oiled machine. They are upfront about pricing, move fast on quotes, and excel at large events where logistics matter. Not the most creative menu, but consistently delivers good food at a fair price.
